title: carex disticha var. sartwellii
intro: Carex disticha var. sartwellii, also known as Sartwell's sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Carex disticha var. sartwellii lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. This plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing fever. Carex disticha var. sartwellii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture, to utilize its medicinal properties for treating various health conditions.
